sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: US firm Applied Materials opens 8.06 lakh sq.ft office in City
feed.summary: Applied Materials India, a subsidiary of Applied Materials, Inc., inaugurated an 8.06 lakh square-foot workplace at the International Tech Park Bengaluru (ITPL). This expansion is expected to strengthen Karnataka's position as a leading hub for Electronics System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM) and a chip design cluster in India. The new facility, along with existing capabilities like the India Validation Centre and an AI Centre of Excellence in Chennai, underscores Applied Materials' commitment to enhancing India's semiconductor ecosystem.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Weighs Cardiac AI Milestone Against Rich Valuation Risk
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical has received FDA clearance for its da Vinci 5 system for minimally invasive cardiac procedures, which includes AI-powered features. While this expansion into cardiac use cases and deeper AI integration could benefit the company, the stock is currently trading at a rich valuation with a P/E ratio significantly higher than the industry average, posing a risk if adoption or usage growth slows. Investors are now focused on how quickly these new capabilities will be adopted and their impact on procedure volumes and market position.

feed.title: Boeing looks to build on momentum at SC Dreamliner plant
feed.summary: Boeing is stabilizing and expanding production at its 787 Dreamliner plant in North Charleston, increasing monthly output from five to eight jets, with plans to reach ten. The company also announced a $1 billion expansion to add a second assembly building and 1,000 jobs. This news follows strong financial performance in the fourth quarter, exceeding Wall Street expectations, and a significant reduction in rework hours for the Dreamliner program.

feed.title: RTX stock price target raised to $227 from $219 at Vertical Research
feed.summary: Vertical Research Partners increased its price target for RTX Corp. (NYSE:RTX) to $227 from $219, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's strong fourth-quarter results. The firm adjusted its EPS estimates for 2026 and 2027 and raised its free cash flow forecast, citing RTX's defense business and conservative guidance for Pratt & Whitney. This positive outlook is supported by RTX's recent outperformance in earnings and revenue against analyst expectations.

feed.title: Venu Holding stock tumbles after announcing public offering of shares
feed.summary: Venu Holding Corporation's stock dropped 16.9% after the company announced a public offering of approximately $75 million in common stock, with an option for underwriters to purchase an additional $11.25 million. The live music venue developer plans to use the proceeds to fund various development projects and complete a real estate purchase in Colorado. The announcement coincided with the release of preliminary Q4 and full-year 2025 results, showing estimated revenue growth and a significant increase in total assets.

feed.title: Vistra Signs Senior Secured Notes Indenture With Wilmington Trust
feed.summary: Vistra has signed a supplemental indenture and completed a $2.25 billion senior secured notes offering. This offering, consisting of $1.0 billion of 4.700% notes due 2031 and $1.25 billion of 5.350% notes due 2036, aims to fund the Cogentrix Energy acquisition, repay existing debt, and support general corporate purposes. The notes are guaranteed by certain subsidiaries and secured by a first-priority lien on collateral.

feed.title: Brown & Brown: Great Insurance Broker's Discount Is Better Now (NYSE:BRO)
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (BRO) remains a Buy due to its consistent profitability, and the recent price drop to $75 offers an attractive entry point. Although short-term organic revenue softness is noted, it's attributed to temporary factors like non-recurring items and CAT rate declines. The company's strong M&A pipeline and expected FCF growth, with 2025 FCF per share estimated at $2.08, underpin its long-term value despite increased debt from acquisitions.

feed.title: Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) Major Shareholder Acquires $34,985,598.93 in Stock
feed.summary: A major shareholder in Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU), Insurance Co Of Ame Prudential, recently acquired 1,406,739 shares for over $34.9 million, increasing its total holdings to 7,709,624 shares. The transaction, disclosed on January 23rd, represents a 22.32% increase in the shareholder's position. Prudential Financial shares traded down 1.4% to $107.42, with a market cap of $37.6 billion and a P/E ratio of 14.76, while analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $120.78.

feed.title: BlackRock Adds Gregg Lemkau as Independent Board Director
feed.summary: BlackRock (BLK) has appointed Gregg R. Lemkau, Co-Chief Executive Officer of BDT & MSD Partners and Chairman of DFO Management, as an independent director to its Board. This move expands the board to 19 members, with 16 being independent, and is intended to leverage Lemkau’s extensive experience in investment banking and capital markets to support BlackRock's future growth and long-term strategy. The company highlighted Lemkau's background from BDT & MSD and Goldman Sachs as a valuable addition to the Board's expertise and diverse perspectives.

feed.title: Makarora and Ares complete $2.1 billion acquisition of Plymouth Industrial
feed.summary: Makarora Management LP and Ares Alternative Credit funds have finalized their $2.1 billion all-cash acquisition of Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc., with Plymouth shareholders receiving $22.00 per share. Following the deal, Plymouth Industrial REIT has been delisted from public exchanges. The acquisition comes amid a legal challenge from Redimere Advisors LLC regarding the merger.

feed.title: Richard Craig Smith Sells 5,910 Shares of AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) Stock
feed.summary: AutoZone VP Richard Craig Smith sold 5,910 shares of AZO stock on January 23rd at an average price of $3,700, totaling $21.87 million. This sale significantly reduced his ownership in the company by 69.23%, leaving him with 2,627 shares. The stock traded up 0.4% at $3,800.59, with analysts holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $4,285 despite the company missing recent EPS estimates.

feed.title: UPS to Eliminate 30,000 Positions and Shut Facilities While Cutting Amazon Dependence
feed.summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) plans to eliminate up to 30,000 operational jobs and close 24 facilities in 2026. This move is part of a strategy to reduce its dependence on Amazon deliveries and achieve $3 billion in cost savings. The company aims for a more profitable model by scaling back Amazon shipments, which previously accounted for 12% of its revenue, and increasing automation.

feed.title: Sky Harbour Group Secures $10 Million Promissory Note Financing
feed.summary: Sky Harbour Group's subsidiary, Sky Harbour LLC, has secured $10 million in unsecured promissory note financing from Yorkville. The note bears a 7.75% interest rate and matures in June 2027, with the company also issuing 40,000 Class A common shares to Yorkville. The proceeds will be used for working capital and general corporate purposes, while an AI analyst rates SKYH as "Neutral" due to weak financials despite improving revenue and growth initiatives.

feed.title: International Paper Q4 Preview: Expectations May Be Too High Even After Guidance Cut (IP)
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has refocused on its core packaging business after a merger with DS Smith and the divestiture of Global Cellulose Fibers. Despite sequential revenue and EBITDA margin growth in Q3, the company cut its 2026–2027 guidance due to ongoing macroeconomic pressures and European headwinds. Volume gains in North America are impacting margins, while the EMEA region faces structural challenges, leading to a "Hold" rating on the stock due to muted growth prospects and potentially optimistic consensus and fair valuation at current multiples.

feed.title: Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) Stock: Jumps As Company Reaches $309M Returns Policy Settlement
feed.summary: Amazon's stock (AMZN) saw a jump after the company reached a $309.5 million cash settlement in a class-action lawsuit concerning its returns and refund practices. The total relief is valued at over $1 billion and includes significant non-monetary improvements to its systems, alongside an acknowledgement of past "process gaps" without admitting wrongdoing. This settlement adds to Amazon's increasing legal and regulatory costs but was met positively by investors, who reacted to the removal of uncertainty surrounding the lawsuit.

feed.title: AES Announces Fourth Quarter & Full Year 2025 Financial Review Conference Call to be Held on Friday, February 27, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET
feed.summary: The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) will host a conference call on Friday, February 27, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The call will include prepared remarks and a Q&A session, open to the public in listen-only mode via telephone and webcast. Access details, including the participant code 385776, will be available on the AES investor website.

feed.title: US Medicare names Eli Lilly, Pfizer and AbbVie drugs for next Medicare price talks
feed.summary: The U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services has announced a new group of branded drugs from major pharmaceutical companies for the upcoming third cycle of the Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program. This selection includes products from Eli Lilly, Pfizer, and AbbVie, and notably features the first products reimbursed under Medicare Part B. These drugs will be subject to price negotiations with Medicare.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin launches wildfire tech venture with Salesforce, PG&E and Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin, in collaboration with Salesforce, PG&E, and Wells Fargo, has established EmberPoint LLC, a joint venture focused on developing advanced wildfire solutions. EmberPoint will leverage AI, autonomous systems, and military-grade sensors to improve detection, prevent spread, and enhance coordination among first responders. Each partner contributes unique expertise, with Lockheed providing technology, PG&E offering mitigation experience, Salesforce building the digital foundation, and Wells Fargo providing funding.

feed.title: Earnings live: UnitedHealth stock falls 19%, American Airlines slides, Texas Instruments pops, Logitech edges higher
feed.summary: The Q4 2026 earnings season is underway, with major tech companies like Microsoft and Meta reporting. While the S&P 500 is seeing an estimated 8.2% earnings per share increase, some individual companies are experiencing varied results, such as UnitedHealth's stock falling 19% despite an upbeat forecast due to Medicare rates, and Texas Instruments and Logitech exceeding expectations, causing their stocks to pop or edge higher.

feed.title: PPG Industries Logs Higher Quarterly Revenue on Higher Prices, Volume
feed.summary: PPG Industries reported higher revenue in the fourth quarter, reaching $3.91 billion, primarily due to increased selling prices and sales volume across all regions. The company achieved a profit of $300 million, or $1.34 per share, a significant improvement from a loss of $280 million in the same quarter of the previous year, which had included substantial restructuring charges.

feed.title: WesBanco (NASDAQ:WSBC) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Meets Estimates
feed.summary: WesBanco (NASDAQ:WSBC) reported quarterly earnings per share of $0.84, matching analyst estimates, with revenue of $265.78 million. The company's board increased the quarterly dividend to $0.38, representing a 4.3% yield, though the payout ratio is 77.55%. Insiders made both sales and purchases, and institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal names Aman Malik as capital markets COO - Bloomberg
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal's capital markets division has appointed Aman Malik as its new Chief Operating Officer, replacing Nina Knezevic. Malik, previously with Wells Fargo, will report to BMO Capital Markets CEO Alan Tannenbaum. Knezevic will move to a new role within Bank of Montreal focusing on strategic workforce planning.

feed.title: First Community Bankshares completes acquisition of Hometown Bancshares By Investing.com
feed.summary: First Community Bankshares, Inc. has completed its acquisition of Hometown Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary, Union Bank, Inc., adding eight West Virginia branch locations. The transaction, valued at $624.54 million in market capitalization, brings approximately $415 million in assets, $172 million in loans, and $376 million in deposits to First Community. This move aligns with First Community's strategy to grow low-cost core deposits and expand its presence in the Parkersburg-Marietta-Vienna metropolitan area.

feed.title: Eversource Energy Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.7875 a Share From $0.7525, Payable March 31 to Holders of Record March 5
feed.summary: Eversource Energy has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.7875 per share, up from $0.7525 per share. The dividend is payable on March 31 to shareholders of record as of March 5. This adjustment reflects the company's financial performance and commitment to returning value to its investors.

feed.title: Energie by AES Corp: The Quiet Power Shift Everyone in Clean Energy Is Talking About
feed.summary: AES Corp's "Energie" initiative is transforming the electricity sector by shifting from fossil fuels to clean, smart, and resilient power. This global platform integrates utility-scale renewables, energy storage, and digital grid intelligence to reduce outages, lower emissions, and provide more control to consumers and businesses. The company is actively building out massive renewable projects and large-scale battery systems, aiming to create a sustainable and stable energy future.

feed.title: PPG Industries: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. reported fourth-quarter earnings of $300 million, or $1.33 per share, which adjusted to $1.51 per share, falling short of Wall Street's expectation of $1.57 per share. Despite missing earnings estimates, the company's revenue of $3.91 billion exceeded forecasts. For the full year, PPG Industries reported a profit of $1.58 billion on revenue of $15.88 billion and anticipates full-year earnings in the range of $7.70 to $8.10 per share.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Inc. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. (BRO) stock declined by 6.91% on Tuesday, closing at $74.12. This underperformance occurred on a mixed day for the broader market, with the S&P 500 Index rising and the Dow Jones Industrial Average falling. The decline ended a three-day winning streak for Brown & Brown Inc.

feed.title: WesBanco: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: WesBanco Inc. (WSBC) reported fourth-quarter earnings of $91.1 million, or 81 cents per share, which adjusted to 84 cents per share after restructuring costs, meeting Wall Street expectations. The bank posted revenue of $382.7 million for the period, with revenue net of interest expense at $265.6 million, falling short of Street forecasts. For the full year, WesBanco reported a profit of $223.1 million, or $2.23 per share, on revenue of $981.1 million.

feed.title: Ashford Hospitality Trust Inc Announces 2025 Preferred Dividends Tax Information
feed.summary: Ashford Hospitality Trust Inc. announced tax reporting details for its 2025 preferred dividends across several series of shares (D, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, and M). Distributions paid on January 15, 2025, are taxable in 2025, with all distributions classified as return of capital. Form 8937 will be available on the company's website for further details.

feed.title: PPG Industries Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: PPG Industries announced strong financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, with net sales increasing by 5% and 2% respectively, and significant growth in EPS and operating cash flow. The company saw strong performance across its various segments, particularly in Global Architectural Coatings and Performance Coatings. PPG also focused on strategic initiatives like cost reduction and shareholder returns, and projects continued growth for 2026 despite some anticipated challenges.

feed.title: US Medicare names Eli Lilly, Pfizer and AbbVie drugs for next Medicare price talks
feed.summary: The U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services has identified a new set of branded drugs from major pharmaceutical companies for the upcoming third cycle of the Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program. This selection includes products from Eli Lilly, Pfizer, and AbbVie, and notably features the first products to be reimbursed under Medicare Part B, expanding the scope of the negotiation program.

feed.title: Texas Instruments: Analog revenue rises 14% Y/Y
feed.summary: This article provides an update on Texas Instruments' financial performance, specifically highlighting a 14% year-over-year increase in its Analog division's revenue. While only the headline is available in the provided content, it indicates positive growth in a key segment for the company.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Earnings: The Stock Is Rising
feed.summary: Texas Instruments' stock is rising after the company provided a strong earnings forecast for the March quarter. The semiconductor giant's positive outlook is driving investor confidence.

feed.title: Corning: Meta Deal Greatly Expands Our Fiber Growth Expectations
feed.summary: Corning and Meta Platforms have signed a long-term supply agreement for optical fiber cable, projected to reach up to $6 billion in sales by 2030, leading Morningstar to significantly raise its fair value estimate for Corning stock. This deal is expected to materially increase Corning's fiber growth expectations, with a new forecast of $10 billion in new annual revenue by 2030, compared to 2025. Despite the positive outlook, Morningstar has increased Corning's Uncertainty Rating to High due to AI spending risks, noting that the stock appears modestly overvalued given its recent performance.

feed.title: Jack Henry Announces Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Deconversion Revenue Results
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. announced that its deconversion revenue for the fiscal second quarter, ended December 31, 2025, reached $6.2 million. This led to an increase in deconversion revenue estimates to $28 million for the full fiscal year 2026. The company clarifies that deconversion revenue, largely from clients being acquired, is excluded from non-GAAP revenue as it does not reflect the company's core operations.

feed.title: Apple supplier Qorvo’s stock slumps after hours on soft guidance
feed.summary: Qorvo Inc.'s stock declined in extended trading after the Apple supplier issued weaker-than-expected guidance for the current quarter, citing a seasonal decline from its largest customer, Apple. Despite beating analyst estimates for fiscal Q3 2026 EPS and revenue, the radio-frequency chipmaker's Q4 outlook fell short, leading to a 7.9% drop in share price. Qorvo is in the process of being acquired by Skyworks Solutions Inc.

feed.title: PayPal tests Africa strategy in Nigeria with $100 million fund after shares fell 75% in five years
feed.summary: PayPal is re-entering the Nigerian market with a $100 million fund to partner with or acquire local fintech startups, following a 75.6% decline in its share price over the past five years. This move is part of the company's "PayPal World" initiative to integrate with local digital wallets and facilitate international payments, directly addressing previous limitations where Nigerian users could not receive funds. The company has partnered with Paga in Nigeria and aims to consolidate the market, seeking new revenue streams as growth in Western markets slows.

feed.title: Prediction: Super Micro Could Join the $1 Trillion Club by 2035
feed.summary: This article suggests that despite current slowing growth, Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) has the potential to reach a $1 trillion valuation by 2035 due to its expanding role in AI infrastructure and edge computing, new partnerships, and favorable analyst targets. The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor team, however, did not include SMCI in their current top 10 stock recommendations.

feed.title: Con Edison Declares Quarterly Dividend Increase
feed.summary: Con Edison has announced a quarterly dividend increase to 88.75 cents per share, marking its 52nd consecutive annual dividend raise, the longest streak among S&P 500 utilities. The company aims for a dividend payout ratio of 55% to 65% of adjusted earnings. Wall Street analysts currently forecast a slight fall in ED's stock price over the next 12 months, with an average target of $101.18.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.8875 a Share, Payable March 16 to Holders of Record Feb. 18
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (ED) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.8875 per share. The dividend is payable on March 16 to shareholders of record as of February 18. The article also provides recent analyst ratings and price targets for the utility company.

feed.title: Prologis: Entering A Phase Of Accelerated Earnings Growth (NYSE:PLD)
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) is entering a favorable cycle due to tightening logistics fundamentals and new growth from energy and data centers. The company's Q4 2025 results showed strong rental revenue growth and a high portfolio mark-to-market, supporting future earnings. Despite management's 2026 core FFO guidance, the author sees potential for upside due to accelerating demand and data center expansion, projecting an 18% total return by FY27.

feed.title: CF Industries Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.50 a Share, Payable Feb. 27 to Shareholders of Record Feb. 13
feed.summary: CF Industries (CF) announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.50 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 27 to shareholders of record as of February 13. This information was released on January 27, 2026.

feed.title: F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) Releases Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.82 EPS
feed.summary: F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) announced strong earnings results, reporting $4.45 EPS, significantly beating the consensus estimate of $3.63 by $0.82. The company also surpassed revenue estimates with $822.47 million against a $755.97 million consensus, demonstrating robust profitability with a 21.76% ROE and a 22.42% net margin. Following the announcement, F5's stock traded higher, rising $2.98 to $270.43, and analysts maintain an average "Hold" rating with a price target of $299.78.

feed.title: WesBanco Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: WesBanco, Inc. has reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, driven by significant loan and deposit growth, improved net interest margins, and the successful acquisition and integration of Premier Financial Corp. The company announced a substantial increase in net income and earnings per share for both periods, along with successful strategic initiatives like financial center optimization and preferred stock redemption. WesBanco anticipates continued growth through organic efforts, cost control, and leveraging acquisition synergies.

feed.title: Sky Harbour Group Issues $10M Promissory Note
feed.summary: Sky Harbour Group Corp announced on January 27, 2026, the issuance of a $10 million promissory note to YA II PN, Ltd. The note carries a 7.75% interest rate, with a maturity date of June 8, 2027, and requires monthly repayments. Additionally, 40,000 Class A shares were issued to Yorkville in a direct offering, with proceeds intended for working capital and general corporate purposes.

feed.title: Eversource Energy approves quarterly dividend of $0.7875 per share
feed.summary: Eversource Energy announced a quarterly dividend of $0.7875 per share, payable on March 31, 2026, marking its 27th consecutive year of dividend payments. This news comes amidst financial challenges for the utility company, including the rejection of a $1.6 billion sale and subsequent downgrades by analysts, yet Eversource maintains its financial outlook and commitment to energy efficiency.

feed.title: Chevron appoints former American Airlines chairman to board
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation has appointed Thomas W. Horton, former chairman and CEO of American Airlines, to its Board of Directors as an Independent Director, where he will serve on the Board Audit Committee. Horton brings extensive board experience from his roles at Walmart, General Electric, Qualcomm, and Enlink Midstream. This appointment comes as Chevron continues to expand its global energy operations and initiatives.

feed.title: After-hours movers: Texas Instruments, Seagate, Qorvo, F5 Networks and more
feed.summary: Texas Instruments saw its stock rise after reporting solid quarterly performance and better-than-expected guidance. Conversely, Seagate Technology, Qorvo, and Skyworks Solutions experienced declines due to disappointing results or guidance. F5 Networks and Stride Inc. both surged significantly after beating analyst estimates.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Guides Above Q1 Estimates After Roughly In-Line Q4
feed.summary: Chipmaker Texas Instruments (TXN) slightly missed Wall Street's fourth-quarter earnings and sales targets but provided first-quarter guidance that exceeded expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.27 per share on sales of $4.42 billion for the December quarter, compared to analyst expectations of $1.29 per share and a similar sales figure. TXN stock saw a rise in extended trading following the announcement.

feed.title: WesBanco earnings missed by $0.01, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: WesBanco (NASDAQ: WSBC) reported fourth-quarter EPS of $0.84, missing analyst estimates by $0.01. However, the company's revenue of $265.57 million slightly topped the consensus estimate of $265.53 million. Despite the EPS miss, WesBanco's stock has seen positive performance over the last three months and has a "fair performance" financial health score according to InvestingPro.
